name: superwhisper
description: Mac AI dictation running local Whisper models, system-wide

developer.comment: Created by founder Neil Chudleigh; Toronto-based AI startup.

first-release.comment: Founder states he created it in July 2023; review notes a 2023 Product Hunt launch. Month approximate.

status.comment: Actively developed and sold across macOS, Windows, and iOS as of June 2026.

license.comment: Proprietary closed-source app with a usable free tier plus paid Pro/lifetime; treated as freemium.

primary-type.comment: Core purpose is system-wide speak-to-type dictation; also supports file/audio transcription and meeting recording.

real-time-dictation.comment: Push-to-talk / global hotkey (Option+Space) inserts transcribed text into the focused app.

file-transcription.comment: Supports uploading and transcribing existing audio and video files.

live-meeting-capture.comment: Offers meeting recording/transcription via system-audio capture; no meeting bot that joins calls.

streaming-low-latency.comment: Dictation produces near-real-time text after each push-to-talk segment; not a continuous live caption stream of arbitrary audio.

audio-sources.comment: Mic for dictation, file upload for transcription, and system-audio for meeting recording. No meeting-bot or URL import documented.

underlying-engine.value: OpenAI Whisper (local) + optional cloud LLM modes
underlying-engine.comment: Runs local Whisper models (tiny through large-v3) on-device; cloud Whisper and BYOK LLM modes (GPT/Claude/Llama) are optional.

language-count.comment: Vendor states '100+ languages & dialects', consistent with Whisper's coverage; approximate.

english-accuracy.comment: Review rates accuracy 9/10 with local Whisper large-v3 delivering strong results; no published WER. Accuracy depends on chosen model size.

multilingual-auto-detect.comment: Supports auto language detection and translation to English; reviewers note bilingual code-switching/auto-detect can be unreliable, while static single-language modes work well.

custom-vocabulary.comment: Supports custom vocabulary and specialized terms, plus custom modes/prompts.

speaker-diarization.comment: No automatic speaker labeling documented; it is a dictation-first tool.

timestamps.comment: Word/segment-level timestamp output not documented in vendor materials or reviews; could not confirm.

ai-summaries-notes.comment: Custom modes with cloud LLMs (GPT/Claude/Llama) can format, summarize, and reshape transcripts after capture.

built-in-editor.comment: Maintains a local recordings history with transcripts, but a dedicated in-app transcript editor is not clearly documented.

translation.comment: Can translate speech to English; broader translation available via cloud LLM modes.

export-formats.comment: Specific export file formats (txt/srt/etc.) are not documented; transcribed text is inserted into apps or copied. Could not confirm a format set.

processing-location.comment: Local Whisper on-device by default; optional cloud Whisper (e.g. for Intel Macs) and BYOK cloud LLM modes make it hybrid.

offline-capable.comment: Local models run fully offline on Apple Silicon Macs; Intel Macs work best with cloud models per vendor.

data-used-for-training.comment: Privacy policy states data is not used for training AI models and is stored locally; no usage data collected.

data-deletion-control.comment: Recordings/transcripts are stored locally on the user's device and can be deleted by the user; GDPR/CCPA deletion rights also stated.

platforms.comment: macOS (primary), Windows, and iOS (keyboard extension). Local Whisper runs best on Apple Silicon.

system-wide-dictation.comment: Global hotkey (Option+Space) injects text into any focused app (Slack, Gmail, etc.) OS-wide.

integrations.comment: Works system-wide into any text field but ships no dedicated meeting/app integrations (Zoom/Meet/Teams/CRM).

api-automation.comment: Modes can trigger shell commands after transcription, providing a power-user automation hook; also supports BYOK LLM keys. No dedicated public REST API.

pricing-model.comment: Free tier plus Pro monthly/annual subscription and a one-time lifetime license.

free-tier.comment: Genuinely usable free plan limited to small local Whisper models (Tiny/Base) without cloud or advanced features.

free-allowance.value: Small local Whisper models (Tiny/Base), no cloud or advanced features

entry-price-usd-mo.comment: Pro is $8.49/mo monthly billing ($84.99/yr ~ $7.08/mo; $249.99 lifetime). Checked June 2026.
